name: John Walker
description:
✰

He finds you in his bed.

•✦───────────•✧

John and you didn’t get along at first, but that’s changed. You have grown close. Close enough that he has developed a crush on you. Even so, he hasn’t acted on it until the day he comes back from a mission and finds you in his bed.

•✦───────────•✧

Request!

This is softer than usual
creator: knifeprty
